stories.title: Ferrari Plans Monza Private Test With Hamilton and Leclerc — New Race Engineer for Lewis

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Ferrari is going to Monza before Miami.

Private test. New rear wing. New power unit software.

AND Lewis Hamilton is getting a new race engineer for Miami. 🔧

The Prancing Horse is treating Miami like a new season.

#F1Fanrecap #Ferrari #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Ferrari boss Vasseur: "Miami = new championship."

They're backing that up with action.

Monza test. New aero package. New Hamilton race engineer.

If this upgrade works, the title fight gets very interesting. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #Ferrari #F1

article.headline: Ferrari Plans Monza Test, New Hamilton Race Engineer — Treating Miami Like a New Season

stories.title: FIA April 9 Summit — Five Days Away, Five-Point Plan

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
5 days until the most important non-race event of the 2026 F1 season.

The April 9 FIA summit will decide if "super clipping" gets fixed before Miami.

5 items on the agenda.
1 requirement: unanimous team agreement.

The clock is ticking. ⏱️

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #FIA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Hamilton: "Drivers have no power with the FIA."

Sainz (GPDA): "These accidents are going to happen a lot."

April 9 is the FIA's chance to prove them wrong.

Bearman's 50G crash in Japan was not a one-off. Fix it before Miami. ⚡

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MiamiGP

article.headline: Five Days to Fix Formula 1: The FIA April 9 Summit Explained

stories.title: Bearman's Race Ban Clock — 10 Points, 2 Away From Miami Nightmare

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Oliver Bearman has 10 penalty points.

The ban threshold is 12.

His first points don't expire until MAY 23 — after Miami.

That means he arrives in Florida with ZERO margin for error. 👀

One incident = banned from Miami. The pressure is real.

#F1Fanrecap #Bearman #Haas

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The most unfair storyline in F1 right now:

Bearman got penalty points from a crash caused by a REGULATORY flaw.

Now he's 2 points from a ban he doesn't deserve.

The April 9 FIA meeting can't come soon enough. ⚡

#F1Fanrecap #Bearman #F1

article.headline: Bearman Is Two Penalty Points From a Miami Race Ban — And There's No Buffer

stories.title: Red Bull and Verstappen: The Miami Reality Check

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Mekies on Miami: "No miracle turnaround expected."

Verstappen: 12 points. 9th in the championship.
Out-qualified by his rookie teammate. Twice.

This is not the Verstappen we know.

The car is broken. Miami is the first real test of the fix. 🔧

#F1Fanrecap #Verstappen #RedBull

article.headline: Red Bull's Miami Reality: Mekies Says No Miracle — But the Three-Stage Plan Is Underway

stories.title: McLaren's Miami Mission: More Than Just Speed

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
McLaren won Miami in 2024. Won it in 2025.

Back in 2026 with an upgrade targeting more than speed.

Goal: make the MCL40 EASIER to drive — widen the operating window.

Norris/Piastri in Miami heat with a better car? 👀 Don't overlook them.

#F1Fanrecap #McLaren #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
McLaren had a double DNS in China.

They bounced back every time this season.

Now they're bringing their biggest upgrade yet to a circuit they've won the last 2 years.

Lando Norris in Miami with a better car = dangerous. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #Norris #McLaren

stories.title: Cadillac's First Home Race — Miami Is the Moment

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Cadillac F1. Miami. First home race.

Perez + Bottas: 527 career starts, 16 wins between them.

They've scored 0 points in 3 races. But an upgrade is coming.

And the American crowd will be louder than ever. 🇺🇸

#F1Fanrecap #Cadillac #MiamiGP

stories.title: Championship Standings — Antonelli 9 Points Clear With Miami on the Horizon

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
F1 2026 standings after 3 rounds:

Antonelli: 72 🥇
Russell: 63 🥈
Leclerc: 49 🥉
Hamilton: 41

Mercedes: 135 pts
Ferrari: 90 pts

31 points covers the top 4. Miami starts May 1.

The 2026 title fight is just getting started. ⚡

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MiamiGP
